title: 6PCS Star Balloons, 22Inch Large Cream Caramel Explosion Star Balloon Foil Balloons Spike Cone Balloon for Birthday Baby Shower Wedding Boho Party Decorations
features: Star Foil Balloons: This set includes 6 pieces of 22-inch, one-piece, 14-pointed star balloons in vibrant colors: hot pink, red, and pink. These lively star-shaped balloons add a fun and festive touch to your party and are perfect for various celebrations

Premium Quality: The hot pink, red, and pink star balloons are made from high-quality aluminum foil, ensuring they are reusable, durable, and odorless. They hold air for a long time, keeping your party decorations looking fresh and cheerful

Party Decorations: Our 6-pack of hot pink, red, and pink star balloons is ideal for many occasions! Perfect for girls birthday parties, baby showers, bridal showers, anniversary, Valentine's Day celebrations, wedding and women bachelor party

Easy to Use: These star balloons feature a convenient one-piece design for hassle-free decoration. No assembly is required—just inflate and they self-seal. Hang them with string or attach them to walls with glue to elevate your party decor

Warm Tips: Do not overfill the balloons. Keep them away from sunlight, sharp objects, and excessive friction to prevent damage. The star balloons are self-sealing and can last for weeks with normal use
description: Product Description Elevate Your Celebration Elegant colorful star balloons for birthday anniversary festival Christmas party decorations. Durable & Reusable High-quality aluminum foil ensure your decorations stay fabulous for longer. Effortless Decor Simply inflate and hang for an eye-catching display that will impress your guests!
